name: integration_hpa_thrashing
prompt: The api-gateway keeps scaling up and down every few minutes. Is the HPA thrashing? What should we do?

recorded_responses.analyze_hpa_thrashing: {"hpa": "api-gateway", "namespace": "production", "thrashing": true, "scale_events_1h": 14, "pattern": "oscillation between 3 and 8 replicas every 2-3 minutes", "cause": "CPU target (50%) too close to normal operating load during traffic bursts", "recommendations": [{"action": "Increase stabilization window", "from": "0s", "to": "300s"}, {"action": "Raise CPU target", "from": "50%", "to": "70%"}, {"action": "Consider behavior policies", "detail": "scaleDown.stabilizationWindowSeconds: 300"}]}
recorded_responses.get_events:

4m ago  Normal  SuccessfulRescale  HPA/api-gateway  New size: 3; reason: All metrics below target
6m ago  Normal  SuccessfulRescale  HPA/api-gateway  New size: 7; reason: cpu above target
8m ago  Normal  SuccessfulRescale  HPA/api-gateway  New size: 3; reason: All metrics below target
